attributes.Sql Query:
select 
P.BK_PRODUCT_ID                 ,
P.BASE_PRODUCT_ID               ,
P.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE         ,
P.PRODUCT_STATUS_CODE           ,
NULL                            ,
P.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION           ,
P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_FLAG           ,
P.CISCO_FINISHED_PROD_TYPE_CODE ,
P.UNANNOUNCED_PRODUCT_FLAG      ,
P.ADJUSTMENT_PRODUCT_FLAG       ,
NULL                            ,
P.RU_GOODS_PRODUCT_TYPE         ,
P.RU_UDI_COMPLIANCE_FLAG        ,
NULL                            ,
P.RU_ROHS_COMPLIANCE_FLAG       ,
NULL                            ,
P.RU_OS_TYPE_CODE               ,
P.RU_OS_FEATURESET_NAME         ,
P.RU_OS_FEATURESET_DESCRIPTION  ,
P.RU_OS_RELEASE_NUMBER          ,
P.RU_OS_IMAGE_NAME              ,
P.RU_OS_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION       ,
P.RU_COMMISSIONABLE_STATUS_CODE ,
P.RU_CUSTOMER_ORDERABLE_FLAG    ,
P.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID            ,
P.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE             ,
P.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE            ,
P.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID       ,
CASE P.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE WHEN 'GOODS' 
THEN P.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
ELSE P.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END  AS RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,     
P.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
P.PRODUCT_ACCOUNTING_RULE       ,
P.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID           ,
P.PRODUCT_FAMILY_DESCRIPTION    ,
P.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ACTIVE_FLAG    ,
P.SERVICE_SUBGROUP_TYPE         ,
P.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ACTIVE_FLAG  ,
P.RU_BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
P.RU_SERVICE_TYPE               ,
P.RU_GENERIC_SERVC_PRODUCT_ROLE ,
P.RU_SERVICE_BRAND_CODE         ,
P.RU_SERVICE_LEVEL_GROUP_CODE   ,
P.RU_GSP_STATUS_CODE            ,
P.RU_GSP_TYPE                   ,
P.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROGRAM_ID      ,
P.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION  ,
P.PRODUCT_TYPE_ACTIVE_FLAG      ,
P.BK_MANUFACTURING_PLANT_ID     ,
P.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID        ,
P.BUSINESS_UNIT_DESCRIPTION     ,
P.BUSINESS_UNIT_ACTIVE_FLAG     ,
P.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_CODE         ,
P.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION  ,
P.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ACTIVE_FLAG  ,
P.ITEM_KEY                      ,
P.RU_OS_SOFTWARE_ROLE           
from $$COMREFVWDB.r_products p, 
(SELECT PRODUCT_KEY 
   FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.R_BOOKINGS_WK_SBASE  
GROUP BY 1  
UNION ALL
SELECT PRODUCT_KEY
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CONDITIONAL_SALES_MEASURE_TV
 WHERE CORPORATE_COND_SALES_FLAG='Y'
   AND FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN $$FINSTYR and $$FINENDYR
 GROUP BY 1 
UNION ALL
SELECT PRODUCT_KEY
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCAA_NCB_TV
 WHERE DV_NCB_CORPORATE_NCB_FLG = 'Y'
   AND SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN (-9999,-8888)
   AND FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN $$FINSTYR and $$FINENDYR
   GROUP BY 1 
UNION ALL
SELECT DD_FB_PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCAA_FINANCE_BACKLOG_TV
 WHERE DV_FB_CORP_FINANCE_BACKLOG_FLG='Y'
   AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  BETWEEN $$FINSTYR and $$FINENDYR
   GROUP BY 1) b
where p.item_key = b.product_key
